TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-frog_imuy_longversion

S.FORM: yau sunis a yau tmayta tu biyat ‘nay ta tateRaqan na peRasku.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩在看瓶子裡的青蛙。
There was a child looking at the frog in the bottle.

S.FORM: Raytunguzanna ti na wasu a yau biyat biyat a yau ta teRaqan na peRasku.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗對著瓶子裡的青蛙叫。
The dog barked at the frog in the bottle.

S.FORM: maynep ti sunis a yau atu ’nay sizi ’nay.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩和羊睡覺了。
The child and the goat fell sleep.

S.FORM: nani biyat a yau nayzi ta teRaq na peRasku nani mzukat ti.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙從瓶子裡面跑出來。
The frog went out from the bottle.

S.FORM: biyat a yau izipna u mzukat ti.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙的身體出來囉。
The body of the frog came out.

S.FORM: ngid ti qa iza qazukat pasazi tapeRaskuan.
S.TRANSL: 快要從那個......瓶子出來了。
It was about to come out of the ... the bottle.

S.FORM: yau sunis ’nay maynep Raynguanna.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在睡覺，他不知道。
The child was sleeping. He didn’t know.

S.FORM: nani masuat sunis a yau atu wasu ’nay nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩和狗起床。
The child and the dog woke up.

S.FORM: mai ti ya biyat a yau ta teRaq na peRasku.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙不在瓶子裡面。
The frog was not in the bottle.

S.FORM: pameng ti sunis ’nay masuat ngid sikuzu.
S.TRANSL: 小孩只好起床，要穿鞋子。
The child got up and wanted to put on shoes.

S.FORM: tabuq ti mquling ti ‘nay peRasku ’nay.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子倒了。
The bottle fell.

S.FORM: nani yau ti qaysuRanna na a Raytunguz ti ’nay wasu a yau ta izaan na na inpanna.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗進去。狗在床旁邊叫。
The dog entered ... The dog barked by the bed.

S.FORM: tangayawan na inpanna ya peRasku a yau mai ti tu simpez.
S.TRANSL: 床前面的瓶子沒有東西。
There was nothing in the bottle in front of the bed.

S.FORM: yau tausiqan ’nay nani.
S.TRANSL: 在另外一個地方，
In somewhere else,

S.FORM: izaanna ti na wasu a yau peRasku ’nay niqazuanan na ’nay biyat isisanna ti na wasu ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 狗把裝青蛙的瓶子抬起來。
The dog lifted the bottle, in which the frog was put.

S.FORM: ‘nay peRasku a yau mai ti tu simpez.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子裡面沒有東西。
There was nothing in the bottle.

S.FORM: mRaRiw ti ya biyat a yau.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙跑掉了。
The frog ran away.

S.FORM: tmangan tu lepawna.
S.TRANSL: 他開他家的門。
He opened the door of his house.

S.FORM: wiya ti.
S.TRANSL: (他們)離開了。
(They) left.

S.FORM: tanganan na sunis ’nay.
S.TRANSL: 小孩開門。
The child opened the door.

S.FORM: yau ti ta tantanganan tmayta sunis a yau tu biyat a yau sayza.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在走廊上看青蛙。
The child saw (looked for) the frog in the hallway.

S.FORM: wiya ti wasu ’nay u.
S.TRANSL: 狗先走了。
The dog left.

S.FORM: qaysuRan na wasu a yau a peRasku ’nay.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗鑽進瓶子裡。
The dog entered the bottle.

S.FORM: ngibiR na peRasku ’nay qaysuR uRuna tateRaqan ngibiR na peRasku.
S.TRANSL: 牠的頭進入瓶子口裡。
His head entered the bottle.

S.FORM: m yau ti alaanna ti na sunis a yau ‘nay wasu a yau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子把狗拿起來。
The child took the dog.

S.FORM: bawaanna ti na sunis a yau a wasu a yau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩抱著狗。
The child held the dog in the arms.

S.FORM: tazian ti ya qmqeqeRas ti sunis ‘nay tu biyat a yau sayza.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩可能在這裡叫那隻青蛙。
The child perhaps called for the frog here.

S.FORM: mai ti biyat ‘nay.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙沒在這。
The frog was not here.

S.FORM: yau tazian ‘nay usiq ‘nay bunguR na ‘nay paRin.
S.TRANSL: 這裡有一棵樹。
There was a tree here.

S.FORM: yau maziut tababawan na paRin a yau ya nianu ’nay smani ta babaw na paRin niziutan.
S.TRANSL: 樹上吊了什麼東西。
There was something hung on the tree.

S.FORM: ti Raytunguzan na wasu a zau ta bunguRan na paRin a yau.
S.TRANSL: 狗在樹的旁邊叫。
The dog barked by the tree.

S.FORM: nani yau sunis a zau tmayta tu tu biyat a yau tazian ta izaan u ta liapan na paRin.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子在某處 ... 或是在樹的下面看(找)青蛙。
The child saw (looked for) frog somewhere ... or under the tree.

S.FORM: yau ti pameng ti muRing sunis a zau.
S.TRANSL: 這個小孩突然哭。
This child suddenly cried.

S.FORM: tazian yau a usiq mutun.
S.TRANSL: 這裡有一隻老鼠。
There was a mouse here.

S.FORM: yau wasu ’nay situqaw pasazi ta babawan na na paRin mRaytunguz wasu a yau.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗在吠。
The dog barked.

S.FORM: yau ngid zaqis ’nay wasu ’nay tapaRinan ’nay.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗想要爬上那棵樹。
The dog wanted to climb up the tree.

S.FORM: nani yau a mutun a yau ta melanayan.
S.TRANSL: 地上有一隻老鼠。
There was a mouse on the ground.

S.FORM: nani wiya ti sunis a yau mzaqis ta babawan na paRin tmuqaz pasazi ta mzaqis tababaw na paRin.
S.TRANSL: 小孩離開並且爬上一棵樹。
The child left and climbed up onto a tree.

S.FORM: taytaanna nani yau a usiq ’nay adam a yau ’nay.
S.TRANSL: 看了之後，有一隻鳥。
(He) looked. There was a bird.

S.FORM: ku.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹。
An owl.

S.FORM: yau ku a yau tababaw na paRin nani.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻貓頭鷹在樹的上面。
There was an owl on the tree.

S.FORM: muRetut ti sunis a yau suzitang.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩被嚇到，往後掉。
The child was frightened and fell backwards.

S.FORM: mquling ti sunis ’nay nayzi ta babaw na paRin.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩從樹上滾下來。
The child rolled down from the tree.

S.FORM: suRaw ti pasazi talibeng.
S.TRANSL: (他)往下掉。
(He) fell down.

S.FORM: suzitang ti sunis a yau.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩躺在(地上) 。
The child lay (on the ground).

S.FORM: yau ti wasu ’nay mRaytunuz.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗又在叫。
The dog was barking.

S.FORM: mlazut ti mRaRiw wasu ’nay tmanuz.
S.TRANSL: 狗跑得很快。追...。
The dog ran fast, chasing (something).

S.FORM: yau ’nay nani ’nay ku ’nay tababaw tmanbaseR.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹在上面飛。
The owl flew above.

S.FORM: maytis qa qaqaRatan na u qumuni smani na adam a yau a sunis a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子怕鳥會咬他。
The child was afraid that the bird would bite him.

S.FORM: pasababawanna ti ’nay limana mimet.
S.TRANSL: 他的手怎麼往上抓呢？
Why did his hand grab upwards?

S.FORM: tmalawma ti sayza tu iza u tu iRuR.
S.TRANSL: 可能是要穿過什麼 ... 河。
Maybe to cross ... a river.

S.FORM: yau a iRuR a zau tazian.
S.TRANSL: 這裡有一條河。
There was a river here.

S.FORM: talawma pa sayza sunis a yau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩好像要過河。
The child was going to cross the river.

S.FORM: a mzaqis tu ’nay siRmuq ’nay sunis ’nay.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩爬上鹿。
The child climbed up onto the deer.

S.FORM: yau tababawna tuRuzna na siRmuq a yau ’nay sunis a yau.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩在鹿的上面...背上。
The child was up on the back of the deer.

S.FORM: qmeqeRas tu ’nay wasuna sayza.
S.TRANSL: 可能在叫他的狗。
Maybe he called for his dog.

S.FORM: yau ta tuRuzanna na.
S.TRANSL: 在...背上。
Behind the...

S.FORM: na na iza ’nay u qunianna sikawma smani qaya.
S.TRANSL: 我們不知道要怎麼去講。
We don’t know how to say it.

S.FORM: tatuRuzanna na siRmuq tatuRuzan na siRmuq ‘nay wasu ‘nay tmalun ti.
S.TRANSL: 狗躲在鹿的後面。
The dog hid behind the deer.

S.FORM: nani yau ti tazian.
S.TRANSL: 在這裡。
Here.

S.FORM: yau ti zaqisanna ti a uRuna na sunis ’nay zaqisanna uRuna na siRmuq a yau.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩爬上那隻鹿的頭。
The child climbed up onto the deer’s head.

S.FORM: na sunis a yau yau tawakianna tangi siRmuq ’nay.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩現在在那隻鹿的角上面。
The child was on the deer’s horn now.

S.FORM: yau ta tuRuzanna ya wasu.
S.TRANSL: 狗在鹿的後面。
The dog was behind the deer.

S.FORM: nani wiya ti qaniyau tangi smaqay.
S.TRANSL: 他們離開，走開。
They left, and walked away.

S.FORM: pasazi pa ta nawnaungan sayza ya.
S.TRANSL: 可能往山的方向走。
Probably toward the mountains.

S.FORM: smaqay makezi tazian qaniyau sayza tangi.
S.TRANSL: 他們現在可能從這邊走。
Now they probably walked from here.

S.FORM: nani yau Raytunuz a wasu a yau tu siRmuq a yau.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗對著鹿吠。
The dog barked at the deer.

S.FORM: yau tababaw na uRuna pamuquanna na na siRmuq a yau ya sunis a yau tangi.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩在鹿的頭上，被鹿扛起來。
The child was on the head of the deer, carried by the deer.

S.FORM: nani suRaw ti.
S.TRANSL: 跌倒了。
(They) fell.

S.FORM: mquling ti a.
S.TRANSL: 跌倒了。
(They) fell.

S.FORM: tmibuq ti ’nay sunis a yau nayzi tauRuanna na iza luqenaw a yau.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩從什麼東西 ... 從那隻老虎的頭上掉下來。
The child fell down from something ... from the tiger’s head.

S.FORM: a usa luqenaw zinku ’nay siRmuq.
S.TRANSL: 啊，不是老虎，是鹿。
No, not tiger. The deer.

S.FORM: siRmuq a yau tmibuq ti a ni pamuquanna na na siRmuq a yau tu sunis a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那隻鹿扛的那個小孩掉下來了。
The child carried by the deer fell.

S.FORM: tmibuq ti wiya ti pasazi ta talibeng wasu a yau qaya mquling ti pasazi talibengan.
S.TRANSL: 小孩往地上掉下去，狗也掉往地上。
The child fell down and the dog fell down, too.

S.FORM: wasu a yau.
S.TRANSL: 狗掉到下面。
The dog fell down.

S.FORM: tmibuq pasazi ta melanayan ’nay sunis a yau atu wasu a yau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩和狗掉到地上。
The child and the dog fell down to the ground.

S.FORM: pameng ti yau tababawanna na tababaw na betu sayza ’nay siRmuq a zau.
S.TRANSL: 這隻鹿怎麼會在石頭上？
Why was this deer on the rock?

S.FORM: nani yau ti tazanzanuman tmibuq tazanzanuman ka.
S.TRANSL: 他們掉到水裡。
The fell into the water.

S.FORM: nani tmibuq alaanna ti na sunis a zau ya wasu a yau nayzi tazanzanuman qaniyau.
S.TRANSL: 小狗掉到水裡，被小男孩從水裡抱上來。
The dog fell into the water, and was held up by the child.

S.FORM: yau a usiq paRin a yau bunguR na paRin.
S.TRANSL: 有一棵樹...樹幹。
There ws a tree...a trunk of a tree.

S.FORM: yau ti taqazqazan sunis a zau na qalimetka zinna tu wasu a yau.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩在岸邊，跟那隻狗說，「安靜」。
The child was by the shore, and told the dog, ‘Be quiet.’

S.FORM: ngidanna ala sayza.
S.TRANSL: 他想要拿那個。
He wanted to take that.

S.FORM: mnanguy tazanzanuman a wasu a zau stangi.
S.TRANSL: 這隻狗現在在水裡游泳。
The dog was swimming in the water.

S.FORM: tu mala tu paRin na bunguR na paRin sa zaqisanna qaniyau stangi tazanzanuman qaniyau.
S.TRANSL: 他們在水裡爬上樹幹。
They climbed up to the trunk of the tree in the water.

S.FORM: yau ti ta babaw na paRin tangi mzaqis qaniyau ta izaan u tababaw na paRin.
S.TRANSL: 他們爬上什麼東西，樹的上面。
They climbed up onto something, the top of a tree.

S.FORM: qapilayan ti sayza mnananguy.
S.TRANSL: 他們游來游去，游得很累了。
They were swimming, and were tired.

S.FORM: taytaanna yau a uzusa biyat a yau tazian ta kinilanna na paRin a yau Raya ay paRin.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到這裡有兩隻青蛙，在大樹的旁邊。
They saw there were two frogs here, beside a big tree.

S.FORM: zaqisanna ti na na sunis a zau atu wasu ’nay ’nay paRin a yau tmalaw na sayza ta izaan taiRuRan.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗爬上樹幹，可能穿越了河。
The child and the dog climbed up onto the tree and maybe crossed the river.

S.FORM: mwaza yau biyat ’nay.
S.TRANSL: 有很多青蛙。
There were lots of frogs.

S.FORM: yau pama tangi tazanzanuman tangi sunis a zau atu wasu a zau.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子和狗現在還在水中。
The child and the dog were still in the water.

S.FORM: mai pama syaqazqaz.
S.TRANSL: 還沒到岸邊。
They hadn’t arrived at the shore.

S.FORM: yau mwaza biyat a yau ta babaw na paRin.
S.TRANSL: 在樹的上面有很多青蛙。
There were lots of frogs on the tree.

S.FORM: mzaqis ’nay biyat a zau mniz mazmun ka.
S.TRANSL: 很多的青蛙全部爬上去。
Lots of frogs, all climbed up (onto the trunk).
